search_queries_used: site:nice.org.uk NG23 menopause cardiovascular metabolic risk review symptoms
site:nice.org.uk NG238 cardiovascular risk lipid review menopause
site:dha.gov.ae menopause metabolic risk guideline UAE
candidate_sources_rejected: automatic attribution of metabolic findings to menopause
automatic HRT, lipid medicine, diet or weight-management advice
automatic diagnosis, investigation, treatment, medication, dose, procedure, referral, escalation, or discharge instructions
search snippets, landing pages, and broad source-family matches without an exact applicable section
rejection_reasons: Menopause status and metabolic risk require separate clinician assessment.
No medicine or lifestyle recommendation is generated.
Autonomous clinical output is outside this documentation-only research programme and was not mapped.
Only opened exact official documents and directly applicable sections were accepted as evidence.
population_applicability: People with menopause-associated symptoms or status undergoing clinician-led metabolic-risk review; age, sex assigned at birth, premature ovarian insufficiency and comorbidity matter.
UAE_applicability: NICE evidence requires UAE laboratory, cardiovascular-risk, reproductive, HRT and referral adaptation.
recency_verification: Current NICE NG23 and NG238 exact sections were reviewed on 2026-07-14.
superseded_check: Current registered NICE versions were identified.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact menopause symptom section supports onset, change, impact, associated symptom and patient-concern documentation without inferring menopause or attributing metabolic risk.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Lists menstrual-cycle changes, vasomotor, genitourinary, mood, musculoskeletal, and sexual symptoms and their variable severity and duration.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact cardiovascular risk-review section supports measured weight, clinician-reviewed metabolic laboratory results, an entered plan and patient questions only when reviewed; it does not calculate risk or generate advice.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports clinician-led cardiovascular risk review and documented lifestyle discussion without autonomously generating advice.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact review section supports arranged follow-up and clinician-discussed safety net without inserting a fixed interval or therapy.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Defines documented review at three months, annually thereafter, or earlier for ineffectiveness, adverse effects, or clinical need.

unresolved_source_gaps: Menstrual and menopause status, age, symptoms, blood pressure, glucose, lipid values, cardiovascular history, VTE risk, medicines, diagnosis and management remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
